name: Eric Holcomb
subject: Good government, great value
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
It’s no secret that times are tough economically, and if you like me, then you have to tighten your belt every once and a while. I believe government | | | | | | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/6e6682a377a2430b9abe8e83a71aae24?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=3bfaffcfe379427fb382560b3ff2dbbb&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=Image_Header_Logo&utm_term=Government-Spending&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20161007-good-government-great-value-16266-petition) |
---|---|---
| | | | Friend, If you're like me, **you believe government should be required to live within its means.** As your next Governor, I will make sure our government maintains fiscal discipline while continuing to deliver exceptional service to every Hoosier taxpayer – that’s why providing good state government at a great taxpayer value is the fourth part of my **Taking Indiana to the Next Level Plan.** **We will work hard to ensure that we:**
* Pass another honestly balanced budget while maintaining our healthy rainy day fund to preserve our AAA credit rating
* Protect the Healthy Indiana Plan from Washington, D.C. Intrusion/Takeover
* Deliver Efficient Government that Exceeds Taxpayer Expectations
* Honor our Commitments to Hoosier Veterans

**Every Hoosier deserves a good government at a great value. One of the main goals of my governorship will be to deliver on that promise.** **[Add your name to our list of those who support fiscal responsibility from our government.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/6bd6a9faa198422a88270707b575231f?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=3bfaffcfe379427fb382560b3ff2dbbb&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta&utm_term=Government-Spending&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20161007-good-government-great-value-16266-petition)** Thank you,Eric Holcomb

name: Evan Bayh
subject: big day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50519/7be36b49/1e444d59/78f83960/212696037/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

Tomorrow is a big day. It'll mark one month out from Election Day, November 8th.

I've run campaigns before, so I know what to expect in the last month. Everything gets sped up and decisions about ads, voter outreach, and more are made lightning-fast. These could be campaign-winning (or losing) decisions -- but to be honest, a lot of them depend on what types of funds are available.

I want to be sure we make all the _right_ decisions and don't sacrifice anything we need to win this race because we can't afford it. **[So I'm asking you to donate $5 to the only campaign in this race that's fighting for Hoosier values by midnight tomorrow.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50519/7be36b49/1e444d59/78f83967/212696037/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161007.2nd&amount=10")** The best part? **A group of supporters will match your gift -- but only until midnight tomorrow.**

Friend, I deeply appreciate your help to date. This campaign is as successful as it is because of you. And I'm eager to work together to achieve our shared priorities of good jobs for Hoosiers and a safe nation.

But this race is turning into a close one -- so in the next month, let's redouble our efforts and put everything we can into winning. For Indiana.

**[Will you pitch in $5 to make sure our team has everything we need to win on November 8th?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50519/7be36b49/1e444d59/78f83967/212696037/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161007.2nd&amount=10") Your gift will be matched through midnight tomorrow.**

Thank you, as always,

Evan **********[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50519/7be36b49/1e444d59/78f83966/212696037/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161007.2nd&amount=25")**********

| | Hi there,

October could make or break the majority of our races, and that means we have no time to waste.

We're coming off of a very successful September -- it was our best September in EMILY's List history! Now we have to hit our highest fundraising goal for the cycle this month.

Our October goal is so big because now's the time when any final attack against a candidate or exciting new TV ad or debate could decide the outcome of a race.

So we need to beat this goal too -- because every dollar we raise now goes straight out the door to our candidates who need it most.

**[Donate $3 to help raise the last-minute funds to support our candidates in the last 32 days of their races.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0964/24c69fd9/127121f8/18eba028/2893387645/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161007_email_OctoberFundraising?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+if+consinConsGroup8240+According+to+our+&utm_campaign=WPEFEV15N_digital_email_20161007_OctFundraising_n-all&source=WPEFEV15N_digital_email_20161007_OctFundraising_n-all")**

We have a lot left to do to help make sure our candidates come out on top.

But rest assured that every penny is being put to good use. Our candidates will be using the funds to respond to last-minute attacks, open their last round of field offices and hire field staff, print the final pieces of mail that voters may see before going to the polls, and so much more.

**There's not a lot of time, but plenty to do. Make sure our candidates have the support they need to win by donating $3 today:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/October](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0964/24c69fd9/127121f8/18eba029/2893387645/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161007_email_OctoberFundraising?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgOctober&utm_campaign=WPEFEV15N_digital_email_20161007_OctFundraising_n-all&source=WPEFEV15N_digital_email_20161007_OctFundraising_n-all")**

Leigh K. Warren

subject: the finish line is in sight
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:

Peter, Democracy depends on folks like you making your voice heard. But you can't have your say if you're not registered to vote. Otherwise, they won't be able to vote in November. But here's the good news: Registering to vote is easy. body:
I want to tell my father that your donation helped fund our final 30 Day push. |

Friend, Election Day is only 30 days away, which means we have very little time left to contact our supporters and turn them out to vote between now and November 8th. My father is traveling the country, speaking with voters, and listening to the American people. And our volunteers nationwide are reaching out to folks and making sure they’re going to the polls to vote for my father. With only 30 days left, we’re firing on all cylinders, and we cannot afford to take our foot off the gas now. That’s why I am personally asking you to contribute $35, $50, or even $100 right now to make sure we are able to counter any false attacks Crooked Hillary and her Special Interest Super PACs throw our way. You know they’re coming Friend. These false, negative ads are going to start coming quickly now that there are only 30 days left. And we absolutely need to make sure we are fully funded, or else we won’t be able counter each and every one of these false attacks with the truth. That’s what Crooked Hillary is hoping for. But what she doesn’t realize is that when you attack our movement with false ads and blatant lies, we will not stand for it. Friend, I want to tell my father that your donation helped fund our final 30 Day push. Will you contribute $35, $50, or even $100 right now so I can tell him that today? | | | | Friend, When we launched this campaign, we knew it would be an uphill battle. **But thanks to the support from all the amazing Hoosiers across the state, we’ve launched a campaign, built a winning team, and are poised for victory – all in just 100 days.** And now, we’re coming up on the final month of the election. **That’s right, a month from today is Election Day and momentum is on our side.**
**[Will you contribute $31 to help seal victory in the last 31 days?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/b5d15499e86d4d979c4f5e113e9f3a20?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=135922045edf45d0aff89f81437855bb&amount=31&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_amount&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20161008-100-days-to1-month-16266-direct)** Just this week we've had some phenomenal victories. We announced that we raised $7.7 million dollars to spread our message to Indiana.
And then Howey Politics changed our race status from Leans-Gregg to a Tossup!
We're closing the gap and headed towards victory -- but there is still much work to be done.
So from now until November 8th, we need to do everything we can to make sure our conservative voice has a place in Indiana for years to come. **[Will you contribute $31 to help seal victory in the last 31 days?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/bd09598c5d044ec5b4dbb0faef3e8610?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=135922045edf45d0aff89f81437855bb&amount=31&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_amount_2&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20161008-100-days-to1-month-16266-direct)**
Everything we’ve worked hard to achieve will come down to these final 31 days. I know that with you by my side, friend, we can win. **[Help us win in November by contributing today!](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/b6d6932bdd4c4eefa711312a42991374?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=135922045edf45d0aff89f81437855bb&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=gfr&utm_content=20161008-100-days-to1-month-16266-direct)** Thank you,Eric Holcomb

body:
Greg for Montana

Watch tonight's debate!

Friend,

Tonight is the final debate of
this campaign.

I wish I could say we would be
debating again in Columbia Falls, and Glasgow, and other towns
around the state, but Steve Bullock rejected four other debate
invitations.

Because he doesn't want to defend
his failed record to the voters. Tonight, watch for these
whoppers!

Steve Bullock will try to
tell you we're #1 in fiscal prudence - but the truth is we're
#26.
Steve Bullock will try to say
our economy is growing - but the truth is the $300 million rainy
day fund he promised is no longer there, and we're losing jobs
across our timber, coal, rail and mining industries.
Steve Bullock will try to say
he's been responsible with our tax dollars- but the truth is he's
flown the state plane around on your dime to concerts and
campaign fundraisers.
Steve Bullock will try to
disparage my proven record of job creation here in Montana - but
the truth is he outsourced $70 million in our tax dollars to
promote Montana tourism - to Wisconsin!

It's time for real leadership.
It's time for accountability.

Can you send just $15 to show
you're with us?

Thank you,
Greg

That kind of determination shows she is tough and if we stand with her she can win in this close race.

name: TEAM COLE
subject: Overload
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend -- In case you missed it _NPR_ [broke](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwvpublic.org%2Fpost%2Fbillionaire-gubernatorial-candidate-owes-15-million-taxes-and-fines&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overload&n=1) a blockbuster story yesterday morning that will have a huge impact on the Governor's race. They reported on the $15 million in unpaid mining fines and taxes Jim Justice has left littered across six states at the same time he is spending almost $3 million on his race. The trouble for Justice didn't stop there. Today, the _Charleston Gazette-Mail_ [reported](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.wvgazettemail.com%2Fnews%2F20161007%2Ftaxes-on-the-greenbrier-went-unpaid-for-months-&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overload&n=2) on Justice's tax liens at The Greenbrier -- his central argument as to why he should be elected Governor. Justice's tax troubles have created an _**overload** _of stories statewide with coverage in every part of West Virginia including this great story on _WOWK_ about the [impact ](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.tristateupdate.com%2Fstory%2F33344422%2Fnpr-jim-justices-companies-owe-15-million-in-mine-fines-and-back-taxes&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overload&n=3)it will have on the race.

The trouble for Jim Justice is that he has for weeks challenged voters to "name one thing Jim Justice said Jim Justice would do and hasn't". Now we know there are 15 million of them. The issue goes beyond the fact that he stiffs vendors, refuses to pay fines for the unsafe mines he operates, and avoids paying the taxes he owes. Listen to him lie about his mine safety record [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsoundcloud.com%2Fkent-gates%2Fjim-justice-a-safety-fanatic&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overload&n=4). The taxes he owes have cost state and local governments -including some $4.5 million in West Virginia - funding for our schools, garbage collections, police, senior services and health care. He thinks its OK to harm West Virginians just because he believes the rules don't apply to him. Listen to him lie about his record paying his bills and taxes [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsoundcloud.com%2Fkent-gates%2Fjim-justice-lies-about-paying-his-obligations&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overload&n=5). All this from the candidate who is running on a simple platform: voters should "[trust him](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsoundcloud.com%2Fkent-gates%2Fjim-justice-trust-me&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overload&n=6)". The _Charleston Gazette_ ran a great editorial on Jim Justice's bad behavior that questioned whether he can be trusted to serve as Governor. You can read the full editorial [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.wvgazettemail.com%2Fgazette-editorials%2F20161008%2Fgazette-editorial-if-justice-wants-to-be-wv-governor-he-needs-to-act-like-it&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overload&n=7). All this bad news for Justice came after a poor debate performance on Tuesday night. He once again went to great lengths to avoid sharing any real plan to move our state forward and instead went back to voters should simply trust him. _The Intelligencer_ has a [clear assessment](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.theintelligencer.net%2Fopinion%2Flocal-columns%2F2016%2F10%2Fjustice-plan-simple-trust-me%2F&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overload&n=8) of the debate and who won. Bill Cole shared a vision and a plan to move West Virginia forward while Jim Justice offered failed slogans and false promises, just like the politicians that support him. TEAM COLE
[http://www.billcolewv.com/](http://www.billcolewv.com/?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=overload&n=9)

Donald Trump was supposed to campaign with Senator Johnson in Wisconsin today. But after last night's news, he's decided to sit this one out. (The _Washington Post_ published unedited audio of Trump having a disgusting conversation about women. And I'm not talking about the usual amount of "disgusting." Trump's latest remarks are predatory and unprintable.)
Senator Johnson has said Trump's comments are indefensible -- _but he still doesn't seem to think his candidacy is all that bad._ It's long past time for Senator Johnson to grow a backbone and drop his support of Donald Trump.
**Because if Senator Johnson won't stand up to this racist, sexist, predatory, and hateful bully, how can we count on him to represent the families of Wisconsin in Washington?**
The contrast is clear: The presidency, the Senate, and the Supreme Court are all at stake. I'm not exaggerating when I say the future of this country is on the line. And the path to retaking the Senate majority starts right here, in Wisconsin.
**[We have one month to beat these guys. And, to do that, we have to reach our goal of raising $500,000 in grassroots contributions by midnight on the 31st. Donate $5 right now.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45fe/1c469400/177bb0/357e517/3750253311/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-october?utm_source=ema_2016-10-08_tom-trump_nd&refcode=ema_2016-10-08_tom-trump_nd&utm_campaign=tom-trump&utm_medium=ema")**
Trump and Senator Johnson still think they have a chance of winning Wisconsin -- but thankfully, come November 8, Wisconsinites will get our say.
Thanks,
Tom Russell
Campaign Manager

| Friend -- Yesterday, a recording surfaced of Donald Trump boasting about sexually harassing women. How did Marco Rubio respond? With a tweet and empty rhetoric. The bottom line is this: he still wants Donald Trump to be our next President.

This is appalling. [**Will you add your name to demand that Rubio withdraw his endorsement of Trump after this latest sickening news?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d89/738133e4/31368b1c/7f8571dd/2927676283/VEsE/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e161008/?subsource=ngpattre161008")

Even after this, Rubio still supports Trump for President. This is cheap talk from a coward who refuses to muster the courage to put his state and country before his political career.

While this is the latest offense, Marco Rubio has stood by Donald Trump's racist and misogynist behavior for months. [**Enough is enough -- call on Marco to immediately withdraw his endorsement of Donald Trump.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d89/738133e4/31368b1c/7f8571dd/2927676283/VEsF/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e161008/?subsource=ngpattre161008")

Thank you,
Patrick
